title: alsophila brausei
intro: Alsophila brausei, also known as the Brause's tree fern, is a species of tree fern that belongs to the family Cyathea. The plant has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its rhizome, which is used to treat various health conditions such as fever, rheumatism, and skin infections. The health benefits of Alsophila brausei include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is typically prepared as a tea or infusion, and in some traditional medicine practices, it is also used in the form of a poultice or topical application.
